name: QiHang

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: The provider's documentation describes use of 'CN2 GIA' network routing and presents the service as a China-based AI API aggregator; no EU-region or EU-only processing option was found in primary-source documentation.

notes: Very limited primary-source compliance documentation was publicly discoverable. Public docs confirm an API service and paid/recharge-based usage, but no privacy policy, DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, retention policy, SCC statement, or EU-only processing commitment was found on the provider's official sites.
